label: Strategy Live Launch Gate
description: Describe the explicit evidence and permission checks required before a bounded live strategy launch.

inputs.name: matrix
inputs.description: Frozen strategy roster or matrix slots to launch.

inputs.name: budget
inputs.description: Per-strategy or total live budget boundary.

outputs.name: launch_decision
outputs.description: Leader decision with wallet readiness, fabric status, stop criteria, and rollback/cancel plan.

failureModes.description: Wallet store, mnemonic import, encryption key, or safe readiness is not confirmed.
Budget, duration, stop criteria, cancel path, or reconciliation path is missing.
The task tries to promote or size up from diagnostic-only evidence.

evidencePolicy: Live/order/wallet actions must be explicit tasks with Leader approval.
Diagnostic live evidence does not justify promotion or size increase by itself.
Stop, cancel, reconciliation, residual inventory, and settlement plans must be named before launch.
notes: This descriptor is intentionally manual because it guards fund-affecting actions.
